ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drafts" (
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft event */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the draft */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the draft */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the draft event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the draft (e.g., Active, Completed) */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the draft */,
  "number_of_picks" INTEGER /* Total number of picks in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("draft_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's college */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school the player attended */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Player's social media handle */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "draft_eligibility_year" TEXT /* Year the player becomes draft-eligible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_picks" (
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each draft pick */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft event */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the draft pick */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number within the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who was picked */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team making the pick */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trade if the pick was traded */,
  "pick_status" TEXT /* Status of the pick (e.g., Selected, Traded, Forfeited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pick_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES draft_trades ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_picks_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the team is based in */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Current head coach of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "website" TEXT /* Team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colleges" (
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college */,
  "college_name" TEXT /* Name of the college */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the college is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the college is located */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* College's mascot */,
  "founded_year" TEXT /* Year the college was founded */,
  "conference" TEXT /* College's conference affiliation */,
  "website" TEXT /* College's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for the stats */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played in the season */,
  "touchdowns" INTEGER /* Total touchdowns scored */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "passing_yards" INTEGER /* Total passing yards for quarterbacks */,
  "rushing_yards" INTEGER /* Total rushing yards for running backs and other positions */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Total receptions for wide receivers and tight ends */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Total sacks for defensive players */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions for defensive players */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the scout works for */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scout */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the scout */,
  "position" TEXT /* Scout's position within the team */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the scout has been in the profession */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouting_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being reported on */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scout who created the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments and observations from the scout */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Numerical rating for the player (e.g., out of 100) */,
  "pros" TEXT /* Player's strengths */,
  "cons" TEXT /* Player's weaknesses */,
  "draft_prospect" TEXT /* Indicates if the player is a draft prospect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scouting_reports_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "draft_id" INTEGER /* ID of the draft in which the trade occurred */,
  "team_id_from" INTEGER /* Reference to the team giving up the pick */,
  "team_id_to" INTEGER /* Reference to the team acquiring the pick */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Draft pick number that is being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date the trade was made */,
  "trade_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the trade (e.g., other draft picks or players involved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_trades_team_id_from FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_from") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_trades_draft_id FOREIGN KEY ("draft_id") REFERENCES drafts ("draft_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draft_trades_team_id_to FOREIGN KEY ("team_id_to") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draft_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "pick_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the draft pick */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the draft */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team that made the pick */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the draft pick */,
  "pick_number" INTEGER /* Pick number in the round */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pick (e.g., Selected, Traded, Forfeited) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviated position name */,
  "primary_role" TEXT /* Primary role of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "college_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each college record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "college_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the college */,
  "years_attended" TEXT /* Years attended at the college */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree obtained from the college */,
  "major" TEXT /* Player's major */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Player's GPA */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_records_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_college_records_college_id FOREIGN KEY ("college_id") REFERENCES colleges ("college_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of past injuries */,
  "last_checkup" TEXT /* Last checkup date */,
  "injury_types" TEXT /* Types of injuries the player has had */,
  "surgery_history" TEXT /* Surgical procedures the player has undergone */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Player's current rehabilitation status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_health_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the role (e.g., Admin, Standard) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user works for */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
